name: portfolio-vault
description: A local-first Codex plugin for recording, importing, auditing, and reviewing personal investment positions.

interface.shortDescription: Manage a local investment ledger and position dashboard from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Portfolio Vault runs a local web service and MCP server for a personal, local-first investment vault. It keeps an append-only ledger, import drafts, source evidence, derived positions, and a review-focused localhost UI for approving CSV or screenshot imports before they enter the formal ledger.
defaultPrompt: Import this brokerage screenshot into Portfolio Vault as a draft.
